title: Palantir, XAI, PayPal, and Robinhood stock analysis
full_text: Shay Boloor, chief market strategist at Futurum, breaks down Palantir's strong earnings report and future guidance. He also analyzes Elon Musk's decision to merge XAI and SpaceX, and the implications for Tesla shareholders. Finally, Balor offers insights into the struggles of PayPal and the potential of Robinhood as a 'super app'.
summary: Shay Boloor, chief market strategist at Futurum, breaks down Palantir's strong earnings report and future guidance. Finally, Balor offers insights into the struggles of PayPal and the potential of Robinhood as a 'super app'.
